title: Were there two Spears
wikitext:
[]: Were there two Spears?             Quote Post by Replicator » Sun Dec 09, 2012 9:24 pm When Adam was being excavated in Antarctica, you can clearly see what appears to be the Spear of Longinus impaling it. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Dec 09, 2012 9:28 pm I think it's stated in the classified information that Lilith came to Earth with her own Spear, which was destroyed during the Giant Impact. The Spear of Longinus that we see in the series and movies is Adam's Spear. It's the one that was impaling Adam and keeping her sedated when the Katsuragi Expedition discovered her in Antarctica.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Dec 10, 2012 1:43 am I think it is worth proposing that Lilith's spear has transformed into the visually and functionally similiar 'True Cross' that she is bound on, although the 'classified information' dismisses it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 10, 2012 3:29 am Replicator: It was always a bit confusing, but given the CI clarifies Lilith's Spear as destroyed by First Impact, the only real solution (that I see) is: - Katsuragi Expedition finds Adam impaled on Spear - They restrain Adam with Eva-like cybernetic implants and are able to remove the Spear safely - They send the Spear to another research facility in the Dead Sea region because... I dunno, Seele wanted them to - The notion of the contact experiment is conceived, and the KatsExp realize that they'll need the Spear back, so back to Antarctica it goes Seele might have been motivated to send the Spear to a second set of researchers so that it could be, possibly, "reprogrammed" without the KatsExp's knowledge. Their tampering (using the SDSS, of course) is what results in the Spear triggering Adam's reduction, as opposed to putting her back to sleep like the KatsExp were expecting. However, since Seele were messing with forces they didn't fully comprehend, their meddling inadvertently caused Adam's S2 to go berserk as well, with the resultant more-massive-than-predicted explosion.

Article: Were there two Spears
[]: Were there two Spears?             Quote Post by Replicator » Sun Dec 09, 2012 9:24 pm When Adam was being excavated in Antarctica, you can clearly see what appears to be the Spear of Longinus impaling it. SPOILER: Show

The Spear of Longinus that we see in the series and movies is Adam's Spear. It's the one that was impaling Adam and keeping her sedated when the Katsuragi Expedition discovered her in Antarctica.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Dec 10, 2012 1:43 am I think it is worth proposing that Lilith's spear has transformed into the visually and functionally similiar 'True Cross' that she is bound on, although the 'classified information' dismisses it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 10, 2012 3:29 am Replicator: It was always a bit confusing, but given the CI clarifies Lilith's Spear as destroyed by First Impact, the only real solution (that I see) is: - Katsuragi Expedition finds Adam impaled on Spear - They restrain Adam with Eva-like cybernetic implants and are able to remove the Spear safely - They send the Spear to another research facility in the Dead Sea region because... I dunno, Seele wanted them to - The notion of the contact experiment is conceived, and the KatsExp realize that they'll need the Spear back, so back to Antarctica it goes Seele might have been motivated to send the Spear to a second set of researchers so that it could be, possibly, "reprogrammed" without the KatsExp's knowledge. Their tampering (using the SDSS, of course) is what results in the Spear triggering Adam's reduction, as opposed to putting her back to sleep like the KatsExp were expecting. However, since Seele were messing with forces they didn't fully comprehend, their meddling inadvertently caused Adam's S2 to go berserk as well, with the resultant more-massive-than-predicted explosion.
